nodes.label: Exp4 rot-vs-sleep recovery + SCFF-forgets probe — digits
nodes.rationale: Two panels, class-incremental stream, n=3. Left: all-class held-out acc vs tasks-seen — GD-online flat chance ~0.18-0.21; block-no-sleep also flat/falling ~0.13-0.19 (catastrophic forgetting, even worse than GD-online); block-sleep-full and block-sleep-LUT climb together toward ~0.9-1.0 by the last step, tracking each other almost exactly — sleep recovery is essentially total and the LUT (1/3 store) matches full-history sleep. Right: SCFF all-class linear-probe accuracy stays flat/noisy ~0.895-0.91 across the whole stream — the features never forget, which is why sleep alone (without protecting the bulk) suffices.
